subcodes.first_line: O thou who art illumined from the light of Greatest Guidance! When Moses, the Interlocutor of God, hastened to the wilderness of Sinai, He beheld the blazing flame [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستشرق از نور هدایت کبری حضرت کلیم الله چون بصحرای طور شتافت شعله نور یافت
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as sun, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture
